plugins.name: maccing-growth
plugins.description: Growth toolkit: paid acquisition (Google/Meta/TikTok Ads) + owned messaging (WhatsApp Business Platform), organized into platform/provider groups (meta + platforms/ycloud) with progressive-disclosure references

plugins.name: maccing-notion
plugins.description: Notion API engineering reference: building/editing databases via the data_sources model, formulas (with empirically-verified gotchas), rollups, relations, views/charts, page blocks & positioning (incl. private-API block reordering), full property-type shapes, pt-BR number formatting, and debugging Notion API errors — with a mandatory ancestral-AGENTS.md sweep. Ships a self-hosted notion MCP server (Bun, official MCP SDK) with high-level reader tools: read_agents_md, search (name→id), read_page, read_database (also dumps each column's schema + every view's full config by default; mockup renders any view by name/id/index, faithful to its filter+sorts), describe (a data source's column schema + column icons, or any page/object's metadata), upsert_property (batched create/update of any property — a column + its icon, or a page value), order_properties (re-order a database's properties across its views and/or the canonical order), and render_mockup — one compounding (recursive) ASCII renderer for ALL of Notion (any block, page, or standalone database; every block type incl. lists/to-do/toggle/quote/code/media/columns/simple-table, table/gallery/board/list views) — the mandatory default for showing how a page looks/will-look in chat

plugins.name: google-workspace
plugins.description: Self-hosted Google Workspace MCP (Calendar, Gmail, Drive, Docs, Sheets, Slides, Forms, Tasks, Chat, Contacts) via taylorwilsdon/google_workspace_mcp, run in stdio single-user mode — authenticates to Google directly, so no daily re-authorization. Ships a combined setup + usage skill. An alternative to the official Claude Google connector that keeps you on your own OAuth client and account.
